infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GeoAttend needs your location to track attendance when you are at the office.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: GeoAttend needs your location in the background to automatically check you in and out of the office.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: GeoAttend tracks your location in the background to mark your attendance automatically.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: GeoAttend needs location access to automatically track your office attendance.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: GeoAttend tracks location in background for automatic attendance.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: GeoAttend needs location to check if you are at the office.
